data.title: Inc. Names Thyme Care to Its 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Southeast
data.description: Thyme Care has achieved significant revenue growth, securing a spot among the Top 20 companies. This success can be attributed to key partnerships with major national payers and management of $5 billion in oncology expenditure in 2025. The company, based in Nashville, Tennessee, shared this achievement on March 31, 2026. Thyme Care's focus on oncology services has propelled its ranking to No. 20 on the prestigious annual Inc. list.

data.title: Farmers Insurance® Sets Ambitious 2026 Growth Goal: 1,700 New Agency Owners Nationwide, Expansion Plan Includes New Elite Owner Program for High-Capital Entrepreneurs
data.description: Farmers Insurance® has revealed a bold plan to enhance organic growth and boost its local presence for long-term market share success. The initiative, announced on March 31, 2026, in Woodland Hills, California, involves a significant expansion of its agency force throughout the year. This move aims to solidify Farmers Insurance®'s position in the market and drive further growth.

data.title: KBRA Releases Research – ABS Venture Debt: Artificial Intelligence, Real but Contained Risk
data.description: A recent study by KBRA discusses the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on venture debt within asset-backed securities (ABS), shedding light on potential risks and their current control. Private credit markets are increasingly looking into AI, especially in relation to software and technology borrowers. While the disruption caused by AI is predicted to evolve gradually, it is already affecting the decisions of lenders, the performance of borrowers, and investor confidence.

data.title: Parse Biosciences, a QIAGEN Company, Launches FFPE-compatible Barcoding Technology for Whole Transcriptome Single Cell Analysis
data.description: Seattle-based Parse Biosciences, acquired by QIAGEN, has unveiled its Evercode™ Whole Transcriptome FFPE kits for single-cell sequencing, marking a milestone in the field. These kits, available commercially, facilitate comprehensive single cell RNA sequencing from formalin-fixed, paraffin-embedded samples. Targeted at cancer, neuroscience, and translational research, this innovation empowers researchers with new possibilities. Interested parties can now procure these kits as they begin shipping out to customers.

data.title: McCormick Stock Sinks To 52-Week Low - Here's Why
data.description: Shares of McCormick & Company, Inc. (NYSE: MKC) experienced a 6% decline following the release of better-than-expected quarterly results. This drop occurred as investors showed wariness towards the company's recently revealed $44.8 billion merger with Unilever PLC's (NYSE: UL) food business. This deal, which involves a $15.7 billion cash component, raised concerns regarding the company's future debt levels and potential equity dilution. In the first quarter, the company reported adjusted earnings per share of 66 cents, surpassing the analyst consensus of 60 cents. Quarterly sales stood at $1.874 billion, exceeding the Street's expectation of $1.787 billion. Notably, first-quarter net sales jumped by 17% year-over-year, with a 3% positive impact from currency fluctuations. Looking ahead, McCormick anticipates growth momentum to increase throughout the year due to brand investments, heightened innovation, and other factors. For further details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Grand Opening: U-Haul of Rossford Offers Climate-Controlled Storage Next to I-75
data.description: A U-Haul® retail, moving, and storage facility has opened in Rossford, Ohio, located at 10212 Sportsman Drive, offering the Company’s 1-Year Price Lock on self-storage rentals. The ribbon-cutting ceremony on March 28 was attended by Rossford Mayor Neil MacKinnon III. The grand opening introduced 431 climate-controlled self-storage rooms for rent at U-Haul Moving & Storage of Rossford. This new location will cater to do-it-yourself movers in the community.

data.title: Hologenix and Big Agnes Team Up to Make Sleeping Outdoors a Dream
data.description: A recent partnership between Hologenix, known for its CELLIANT® infrared materials, and Big Agnes has led to the development of a cutting-edge sleeping bag liner in Los Angeles. This innovative product aims to enhance sleep quality, comfort, and accelerate muscle recovery. The collaboration, announced on March 31, 2026, comes as a boon to users seeking an improved outdoor sleeping experience. The new sleeping bag liner is expected to appeal to a wide audience and is set to revolutionize the camping gear industry. With the combined expertise of Hologenix and Big Agnes, the product is poised to bring about a significant change in how adventurers and outdoor enthusiasts approach their rest and recovery routines.
Societe Generale SFH: 2025 Annual Financial Report now available.

data.title: Galaxy boosts retail platform by offering SOL staking at 6.5% yield, with zero fees and variable rewards for users.
data.description: GalaxyOne has introduced Solana staking, offering variable rewards and zero-fee incentives to users. This move expands their institutional validator infrastructure to include retail users, allowing them to engage in staking on the Solana network.

data.title: Ericsson's Annual General Meeting 2026
data.description: Telefonaktiebolaget LM Ericsson, a leading company listed as NASDAQ: ERIC, conducted its Annual General Meeting in Kista, Stockholm on March 31, 2026. Shareholders had the option to vote by post before the meeting as well. Key decisions were made during the AGM.

data.title: LifeTech Scientific Corporation Announces 2025 Annual Results: Steady Revenue Growth with Adjusted Net Profit Increasing 24.9%
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Shenzhen, China, LifeTech Scientific Corporation, a prominent medical device company (stock code: 1302.HK), announced its expertise in minimally invasive interventional solutions. The company is a key player in this field and caters to various sectors with innovative medical devices.

data.title: Arrow Electronics Introduces Omnichannel Platform for Its Components Business on arrow.com
data.description: In Centennial, Colorado, Arrow Electronics recently consolidated its customer-facing digital platforms for its global components business onto the redesigned arrow.com website. The company completed this transition to a singular user experience, creating an omnichannel platform that aims to offer a unified interface for its existing procurement and engineering customers. This redesigned website also serves as a more intuitive online option for customers who typically interacted with Arrow through offline channels. The update marks a significant shift and is part of Arrow's strategy to enhance customer experience.

data.title: Ethereum's bulls need to maintain $2,000 level as a key support amid low volatility, hinting at potential significant price changes.
data.description: Significant price moves may be ahead for Ether as its realized volatility has sharply declined. If historical patterns continue, the price of ETH could experience notable fluctuations, with $2,000 being a crucial support level to monitor.

data.title: Berkshire Medical Center Nurses Vote to Ratify New MNA Contract Strengthening Patient Care, Staffing, and RN Retention
data.description: An agreement has been reached that encompasses better patient care safeguards and increased wages for registered nurses (RNs) in Berkshire County. The agreement, effective as of March 31, 2026, involves RNs at Berkshire Medical Center (BMC), who are members of the Massachusetts Nurses Association. This deal aims to elevate the quality of care provided across Berkshire County, emphasizing improved patient outcomes. Key components of the agreement include bolstered protections for patient care and salary enhancements for RNs to ensure the provision of top-notch healthcare services.

data.title: Livability.com Unveils 2026 Top 100 Best Places to Live
data.description: Franklin, Tennessee - On March 31, 2026, Livability.com released its highly awaited 2026 Top 100 Best Places to Live rankings, featuring the most lively and desirable small to mid-sized cities across the country. The focus of this list is on affordability, highlighting cities that offer high quality of life without breaking the bank. The rankings aim to provide insights into the top choices for individuals seeking vibrant communities to call home.
